Mariners Draft Profile: RHP Logan Reddemann
news_items.summary: Joining arguably the best roster in college baseball this past season via transfer, Logan Reddemann, a 6’3 righthander, immediately stepped into the role of “staff ace” for UCLA and found consistent success despite his mid-major roots. Advertised as a high-floor strike thrower that lacked strikeout stuff, Reddemann had a serious uptick during his time with […]
